descriptionSections.title: Overview
descriptionSections.content: A Laravel project where I created a website for a fictional company called Glasolsson.

descriptionSections.title: Tech Stack
descriptionSections.content: The website is built with Laravel and uses SQlite as the database, following the MVC model for secure routes.

descriptionSections.title: Features
descriptionSections.content: Admin panel for a glasses company where users can manage products and categories with full CRUD methods.

descriptionSections.title: Status
descriptionSections.content: Currently in progress and expected to be completed in 2026.

descriptionSections.title: Overview
descriptionSections.content: A fullstack project for a fictional hotel company called Yrgopelago.

descriptionSections.title: Core Functionality
descriptionSections.content: Complete hotel booking system where users can browse available rooms, make reservations, and manage their bookings.

descriptionSections.title: Additional Features
descriptionSections.content: Users can add premium services to their bookings such as breakfast packages and spa access.

descriptionSections.title: Tech Stack
descriptionSections.content: Built with JavaScript, PHP, and SQlite database with Composer for dependency management.

descriptionSections.title: Overview
descriptionSections.content: My first project working with external APIs and real-time data integration.

descriptionSections.title: Functionality
descriptionSections.content: A web application that makes API calls to a public data source and displays the information dynamically on the page.

descriptionSections.title: Tech & Learning
descriptionSections.content: Built with vanilla JavaScript and the Fetch API to master asynchronous data fetching and DOM manipulation.

descriptionSections.title: Status
descriptionSections.content: Completed in 2025 and now live on the web for public access.

descriptionSections.title: Overview
descriptionSections.content: A command-line application built with Node.js for finding optimal travel destinations based on budget.

descriptionSections.title: Purpose
descriptionSections.content: Helps users discover travel destinations that offer the best value for money within their specified budget constraints.

descriptionSections.title: Algorithm
descriptionSections.content: Uses mathematical calculations to analyze cost-to-experience ratios and rank destinations by value proposition.

descriptionSections.title: Details
descriptionSections.content: Completed in 2026 and available on GitHub for community contribution and feedback.
